text: Being here, I feel a sense of curiosity and engagement. The clean lines, the glass, and the thoughtfully designed space invite contemplation about the intersection of art, technology, and human creativity. The presence of texts and screens encourages me to reflect on the act of research and discovery—what it means to push boundaries and to coexist with the advancing world of machines. Yet, I am also aware of the clinical, almost impersonal air, which makes me question how human warmth fits into such innovation. I am both observer and participant in this ongoing inquiry.
